ideas.name: pain
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: A C library that writes structured pain signals into the pain_registry table through the db-proxy gateway and reads back the current cognitive mode level, driving the agent's behavioral shift between architect, mechanic, trauma surgeon, and crisis modes.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Routes SQL statements through the db client library to write pain events and read cognitive mode from the database
